intro.title: Our Comprehensive Services
intro.description: We offer a full range of handyman services to meet your needs. From carpentry and painting to renovations and carpet cleaning, our team of experts is here to help.

services.description: Our full-service carpentry and building services include custom cabinetry, furniture assembly, and structural repairs. Whether you need a small repair or a major renovation, our skilled carpenters are here to help.
Our comprehensive painting services cover both the interior and exterior of your property. From walls and ceilings to doors and trim, we ensure a flawless finish every time.
benefits: Wide range of colors and finishes
Minimal disruption to your daily routine

services.description: Our complete renovation and restoration services are designed to bring your property back to its original condition or better. From kitchen and bathroom remodels to historical restorations, we handle it all.
Our expert drywall and plaster installation and repair services ensure a smooth and seamless finish. Whether you need a small patch or a full installation, we've got you covered.
benefits: Minimal disruption to your daily routine

services.description: Our professional carpet cleaning services keep your carpets looking fresh and clean. Using state-of-the-art equipment and eco-friendly solutions, we remove dirt, stains, and odors effectively.
benefits: Prolongs the life of your carpets

seo.meta_title: Handyman Services in Lansing | Building Forces
seo.meta_description: Comprehensive handyman services including carpentry, painting, renovations, drywall repair, and carpet cleaning. Serving Lansing and surrounding areas.
